subject: GRB(?)060421 : XRT position
body:
Mike Goad, Kim Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of the Swift 
XRT team :

From a ground analysis of 436 seconds of PC mode data starting
98 seconds after the BAT trigger (trigger no. 206257) we detect a
fading source at position RA 22 54 32.4, Dec +62 43 49.0 (J2000), with an 
estimated uncertainty of 4.1 arcseconds (90% containment).

This circular is an official product of the Swift XRT team.
